libsource.description: 12-Bit Line/Memory Drivers With 3-State Outputs
12-Bit Line/Memory Drivers With 3-State Outputs
ROHM - BU33TD3WG-TR - LDO, FIXED, 3.3V, 0.2A, SSOP-5
12-Bit Line/Memory Drivers With 3-State Outputs
12-Bit Line/Memory Drivers With 3-State Outputs
HDMI Hider

1ch 200mA CMOS LDO Regulators: The BU**TD2WNVX / BU**TD3WG series integrates a 200mA output high performance FULL CMOS regulator into an ultra-compact SSON004X1010 package (1.0mm1.0mm0.6mm) & SSOP5 package(2.9mm2.8mm1.15mm). Additional features include a circuit current of only 35A for low power consumption along with superior noise and load response characteristics, making them ideal for use in power supplies for a wide variety of applications, including logic ICs, RF circuits, and camera modules.

property.name: ki_description
property.value: 1ch 200mA CMOS LDO Regulators: The BU**TD2WNVX / BU**TD3WG series integrates a 200mA output high performance FULL CMOS regulator into an ultra-compact SSON004X1010 package (1.0mm1.0mm0.6mm) & SSOP5 package(2.9mm2.8mm1.15mm). Additional features include a circuit current of only 35A for low power consumption along with superior noise and load response characteristics, making them ideal for use in power supplies for a wide variety of applications, including logic ICs, RF circuits, and camera modules.

libsource.description: 12-Bit Line/Memory Drivers With 3-State Outputs
12-Bit Line/Memory Drivers With 3-State Outputs

12-Bit Line/Memory Drivers With 3-State Outputs

fields.field: BLM18_N1D Series EMI Suppression Filter 600+/-25% at 100MHz 200mA @85

libpart.description: 1ch 200mA CMOS LDO Regulators: The BU**TD2WNVX / BU**TD3WG series integrates a 200mA output high performance FULL CMOS regulator into an ultra-compact SSON004X1010 package (1.0mm1.0mm0.6mm) & SSOP5 package(2.9mm2.8mm1.15mm). Additional features include a circuit current of only 35A for low power consumption along with superior noise and load response characteristics, making them ideal for use in power supplies for a wide variety of applications, including logic ICs, RF circuits, and camera modules.
ROHM - BU33TD3WG-TR - LDO, FIXED, 3.3V, 0.2A, SSOP-5
SMD 0603 thick film resistor 10K 1% Bourns CR0603-FX Series Thick Film Surface Mount Fixed Resistor 0603 Case 10k +/-1% 0.1W +/-100ppm/C
1.8V-3.3V Low-Power Precision CMOS Oscillators
2-Channel ESD Protection Diode for USB Type-C and HDMI 2.0
